task: Describe the major architectural module boundaries of this repository. Explain each module's responsibility and cite the defining production files and entry points. Do not modify files.

Trace one representative request or operation from its public entry point through the main business logic to its external I/O boundary. Cite every transition with production files and key symbols. Do not modify files.

Identify two production implementations of the same responsibility. Compare their inputs, control flow, outputs, error handling, and meaningful behavioral differences with file and symbol evidence. Do not modify files.

Identify one high-risk production flow that crosses multiple modules. Explain the most plausible regression points, the existing test coverage, and the specific evidence supporting each conclusion. Do not modify files.
